sentences.arabic: انْقَطَعَ الْإِنْتِرْنِتُ وَلَمْ يَسْتَطِعْ نَادِرٌ الْعَمَلَ.
sentences.translation: Nestao je internet i Nadir nije mogao raditi.
sentences.translationEn: The internet went out and Nadir could not work.

sentences.translation: Nazvao je kompaniju i prijavio im problem.
sentences.translationEn: He called the company and reported the problem to them.

sentences.arabic: قَالُوا لَهُ: سَنُصْلِحُ الْمَشْكِلَةَ خِلَالَ سَاعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Rekli su mu: Riješit ćemo problem za sat.
sentences.translationEn: They told him: We will fix the problem within an hour.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ وَقَرَأَ كِتَابًا حَتَّى عَادَ الْإِنْتِرْنِتُ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo je i čitao knjigu dok se internet nije vratio.
sentences.translationEn: He sat and read a book until the internet came back.
